description: Graph automation engine knob. Controls which graph engine the wrapper and hooks invoke. Default is graphify; graphwiki is the opt-in alternative.
notes: engine=graphify: incremental AST-based knowledge-graph refresh, no LLM required.
engine=graphwiki: opt-in alternative; same wrapper contract, different binary.
Change this value, then re-run `ai-catapult graph-hooks install` to re-stamp the wrapper and hook bodies.
